I'll work through this step-by-step.

Start: 28

Step 1: 28 × 4 = 112
Step 2: 112 - 5 = 107
Step 3: 107 × 4 = 428
Step 4: 428 × 4 = 1,712
Step 5: 1,712 + 9 = 1,721
Step 6: 1,721 - 12 = 1,709
Step 7: 1,709 - 12 = 1,697
Step 8: 1,697 × 2 = 3,394
Step 9: 3,394 × 4 = 13,576
Step 10: 13,576 × 4 = 54,304
Step 11: 54,304 × 4 = 217,216
Step 12: 217,216 + 14 = 217,230
Step 13: 217,230 - 10 = 217,220

Step 17: 217,249 + 12 = 217,261
Step 18: 217,261 × 3 = 651,783
Step 19: 651,783 × 2 = 1,303,566
Step 20: 1,303,566 × 4 = 5,214,264
Step 21: 5,214,264 × 2 = 10,428,528
Step 22: 10,428,528 - 12 = 10,428,516
Step 23: 10,428,516 - 13 = 10,428,503
